a.content: The Atlas CRM Migration go-live is confirmed for October 1.
a.source: Go-live for the Atlas CRM Migration confirmed: October 1.

b.content: The Atlas CRM Migration go-live is confirmed for September 1.
b.source: We confirmed September 1 as the Atlas CRM Migration go-live.

notes: Same slot (one go-live date), two values, neither record shows awareness of a change — a human must decide. Also exercises the distinct-escalation: these embed nearly identically.
